close_reason: Fixed build output path to show .turnkey isolation dir
description:
The docs/user-manual/src/workflows/building.md shows the wrong build output path.

**Current (incorrect):**
```
buck-out/
├── v2/
│   └── gen/
│       └── root/
│           └── path/to/target/
```

**Should be:**
```
buck-out/
├── .turnkey/
│   └── gen/
│       └── root/
│           └── path/to/target/
```

**Why .turnkey?**
The isolation directory is set to `.turnkey` (via BUCK_ISOLATION_DIR) so that language tools don't get confused by build artifacts:
- Go ignores directories starting with `." when scanning for packages
- Cargo ignores dot-directories
- pytest ignores dot-directories by default

This prevents errors like Go trying to parse generated .go files in buck-out, or pytest collecting test files from build outputs.

Should also add a brief explanation of this in the docs.
title: Fix build output path in building.md documentation
